arguments.evidence_content: Local tooling checks support mobile enabling architecture. Current bootstrap verification ran Haft spec checks, shell syntax checks, git diff whitespace checks, safe disabled checked-in OpenCode MCP config validation, Swift build, Swift tests, and clean-home bootstrap integration before attaching this evidence.
Swift checks support mobile offline environment. Current bootstrap verification ran swift build and swift test successfully in mobile/ before attaching this evidence.

Scoped diff supports mobile implementation boundary. Current bootstrap verification checked staged and unstaged diff hygiene, confirmed the working tree does not touch server/, and ran Swift mobile verification before attaching this evidence.

Session focus and Swift checks support mobile MVP role. Current bootstrap verification preserved the committed mobile-focus note without raw chat text or session identifiers and ran Swift mobile verification before attaching this evidence.
arguments.carrier_ref: mobile verification and local session evidence 2026-06-30
